creator: xmj@chaot.net
text:
On Mon, Mar 17, 2014 at 04:42:34AM +0000, linimon@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> I'm confused.  I don't see this port in the SVN repository, nor is there
> a mention in ports/MOVED.

You can find it as "math/wingz3".

However, if I'm not completely mistaken, it won't run with current
linux_base-f10, as Fedora 10 doesn't ship libc5.

Best,
-J
